creator: joe@pavilion.net
text:
Server was running under 2.1.5-RELEASE with no problems.
	Upgraded to 2.1.7.1 using CVSUP and RELENG_2_1_0 yesterday.
	The server has hung with scsi bus timeouts three times in the
	last 12 hours.

	Custom kernel with 'users 64' and 'maxmem 96mb'.  Lots of
	devices  commented out.

Fix: 

Rebooted under the original 2.1.5 kernel.
